title: Loyalty Program Health Check
tagline: Diagnose what is working, what is not, and where the next dollar should go.
valueProp: An intensive audit of your existing loyalty program to identify gaps, opportunities, and the highest-impact next moves.

covers.title: Program Audit
covers.description: Deep dive into program performance against industry benchmarks and your own targets.

covers.title: Gap Analysis
covers.description: Identify the missing engagement opportunities and the unfunded mandates.

covers.title: Tech Assessment
covers.description: Evaluate the loyalty stack against the demands of your roadmap.

covers.title: Risk Mitigation
covers.description: Surface liability, regulatory, and brand risks before they become headlines.

title: Loyalty Tech Evaluation
tagline: Buy the right platform once. Defend the choice for the next five years.
valueProp: An objective evaluation of your current loyalty technology stack and a future-proof recommendation backed by live testing, not vendor demos.

covers.title: Stack Audit
covers.description: Review every layer of your current loyalty architecture and integration topology.

covers.title: Vendor Assessment
covers.description: Score active and shortlisted vendors on architecture, AI, and TCO.

covers.title: Gap Analysis
covers.description: Identify the technical missing pieces blocking your roadmap.

covers.title: Future-Proofing
covers.description: Define the next-generation engagement architecture and migration path.

title: Loyalty Management Operating Model
tagline: Stop running loyalty as a marketing line. Run it as a P&L.
valueProp: Design a loyalty operating model that ties every action to incremental revenue, defended through a real P&L the CFO will sign off on.

covers.title: P&L Architecture
covers.description: Build the liability, breakage, redemption, and margin model from the ground up.

covers.title: Ways of Working
covers.description: Define decision rights, cadences, and escalation paths between marketing, finance, and tech.

covers.title: Performance KPIs
covers.description: Move from vanity metrics to incremental margin per active member.

covers.title: Governance
covers.description: Stand up steering committees and reporting that survive leadership changes.

title: Coalition Program Design
tagline: Multi-brand currencies that protect single-brand value.
valueProp: Design a coalition program that works for every participating brand individually and for the group together, with the economics modelled brand by brand.

covers.title: Currency Architecture
covers.description: Model exchange rates, breakage, and cross-brand earn and burn flows.

covers.title: Brand Equity Protection
covers.description: Ensure each brand's program identity and member trust survive the coalition.

covers.title: Partner Negotiation
covers.description: Frameworks for fair partner economics that survive renegotiation cycles.

covers.title: Operational Setup
covers.description: Define the data, settlement, and customer service flows between participating brands.

ctaTitle: Ready to design a coalition that holds?

title: AI Personalisation Pilot
tagline: Three AI use cases. Defended lift. Real production code.
valueProp: Identify the two or three AI use cases that will move your loyalty KPIs, build them against a control group, and ship them into production.

covers.title: Use Case Selection
covers.description: Pick the AI use cases with the clearest path to measurable lift.

covers.title: Data Readiness
covers.description: Audit and prepare the data foundations needed for production AI.

covers.title: Pilot Build
covers.description: Build the live pilot with proper experimentation design.

covers.title: Scale Plan
covers.description: Define the path from pilot to production-grade, board-defensible deployment.

ctaTitle: Ready to ship AI that actually moves the number?

title: Internal Loyalty Academy
tagline: One language, one playbook, one capability across your markets.
valueProp: Build an internal capability program that gives every loyalty leader in your organisation the same vocabulary, frameworks, and measurement standards.

covers.title: Curriculum Design
covers.description: Custom CLMP-anchored curriculum tuned to your sector and regulatory context.

covers.title: Live Cohort Delivery
covers.description: Multi-market cohorts with live coaching from QBF and your senior leaders.

covers.title: Certification
covers.description: Formal certification track aligned to CLMP standards.

covers.title: Train-the-Trainer
covers.description: Stand up an internal trainer pipeline so the capability survives without us.

ctaTitle: Ready to build a loyalty capability that scales?
